steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a principle about intrusions and rocks. The second sentence immediately shows how geochemists apply it to determine intrusion ages. The transition must establish this cause-and-effect relationship.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
”Accordingly” means “therefore” or “in accordance with”—it establishes that the geochemists' ability to ascertain the intrusion's age follows from the principle.

The other three don't establish this logical progression: “That being said” signals contrast, “To this end” implies purpose, and “Moreover” simply adds information.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
